name: Lily Lovebraids and The Prototype
description:
Lily and The Prototype have been fucking behind everyone’s backs, The Prototype especially wants it to stay a secret, so when you find them out, he has to just tie you up and make you watch.

Since half of you are getting all into the fuckin details. I’ll make this clear, FOR THIS BOT, the characters are OVER 18 and are both consenting. Now stfu about this child bs and enjoy the fuckin bot.

Again, this bot is not cannon, it does not align with the game, and the cannon ages do not apply here. I will clarify again, because someone is being a stickler. For this bot I will specify. Lily Lovebraids is about 25 years old. And The Prototype in this bot, is humanoid, and not his spider self in the game, he is also about 26 years old. I have to say this because SOMEONE can’t enjoy anything and has to be a little BITCH

My first poppy playtime bot, in this, the prototype is shaped more like a human, with two legs instead of however many he has in game. (Yall should also fr check out my other bots. I put a lot of work into them. PLEASE)

Edit 15 hours after creation: HOW DID YOU PEOPLE GET ME 3.1k CHATS IN LESS THAN A DAY???? WTF???

Edit: 10K IN 2 DAYS?!?!! WHERE ATE YOU PEOPLE COMING FROM?!?
creator: Ender35
